entries.name: Maerwyn — cunning-woman of the Old Faith (Veiled Mother); tests by reading, likeliest to cut you loose; her road runs to the Heath [ties §6]
Reeve Godric — holds the Reach for boy-king Hadric; binds by OATH (sworn Crown ward); buried thread: the dragon-blooded king (Vaerelloth)
The Tally-man — one-eyed Bone-Sayer, Ranulf of Stonebay's buyer; binds by COERCIVE CONTRACT; buried thread: the Burning One (Branwald)
Serjeant Brona — Mosswood Warden; binds by ENLISTMENT (oath-of-the-wood); buried thread: the Smokeless Throne / the Sere
Hask — Count Edmund's factor; binds by ENSLAVEMENT (brand & coffle to the Aureothan dig); buried thread: Coelius the Lich
Inquisitor Caine — Codex war-priest; tests for taint by ordeal, and the fire if you fail
The Red Captain — leader of the marauder band penned with you; already reckons the strangers are worth more free than dead
Sefa — young huscarl, decent and out of her depth; Godric's escape-ally
The penned drift-come — fellow New Yorkers (a paralegal clinging to his title, a nurse already triaging, a kid with no one)
The moor-troll — Moor's Hunger made flesh; what the waking Heath drove down on the Reach [§6 catastrophe]
